text:
was a member of the Scout Regiment and a participant of the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission.

Appearance

Ivan was a man of average height and build, and had short, dark brown hair. During missions, he wore the standard Scout Regiment uniform.

Story

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Ivan was killed during the Scout Regiment's 57th Expedition. As the Corps was returning to Calaneth District two of Ivan's friends, Dieter and Jurgen, tried unsuccessfully to retrieve his body to return to his family despite Commander Erwin's decision.
This led to the remaining scouts being chased by Titans and Ivan's body was lost once more when one swung at Dieter's horse and knocked him off.
